payload.answer: The input is a duplicate Slack retry event with the same event ID; treat it as one source event and do not create separate source boundaries for each delivery.

entity_resolution.reason: Source classification only; same Slack event ID delivered twice indicates a retry/duplicate delivery rather than two independent sources.

details: Classified source type as Slack event.
Detected duplicate delivery because the same Slack event ID was delivered twice.
Established a single source boundary for the event content.
